form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up in a small field at this track on January 31 over 320m, 2.75 len behind In The Lead with 55kg at $14.40. Second-up in a small field at this track on March 14 over 320m, 0.8 len behind Favorite Mojo carrying 57kg at $4.70. One of the roughies.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start 3rd in a small field at this track on March 15 over 101m, 0.6 len behind Special Gray Cartel with 57kg at $3.70. At only start last preparation rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at this track on November 30 over 274m, 0.3 len behind Be Careful with 57kg at $13.60. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Last start second last of 7 at this track on March 7 over 366m, 3 len behind Beuteeful carrying 57kg at $45. Before that 3rd of 9 at this track on January 11 over 320m, 1.3 len behind Slatedtoshine carrying 57kg at $15.30. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track on February 15 over 274m, 1.3 len behind Caribbean carrying 55kg at $10.90. Second-up set the pace for much of the race 2nd in a small field at this track on March 14 over 320m, 0.5 len behind Favorite Mojo with 55kg at $4.60. Not far off the winner latest and looks a genuine hope.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up of 7 at this track on February 15 over 274m, 2.5 len behind Caribbean with 57kg at $7. Last start in a small field at this track on March 15 over 101m, 1.1 len behind Special Gray Cartel with 57kg at $13.40. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a 0.1 len at this track March 14 over 274m defeating Queen Monarch carrying 57kg at $2. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at this track on June 29 over 274m, 2.25 len behind Gold N Miss with 56kg at $3.50. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Freshened for 56 days. Resuming 4th of 9 at this track on January 11 over 320m, 1.5 len behind Slatedtoshine with 57kg at $5.70.
